name: Daily KPI pull
prompt: Run kpi-pull skill. Snapshot Shopify + GA4 + Klaviyo + Meta (when wired) → outputs/kpi-snapshots/{date}.json. Append a one-line summary to outputs/index.jsonl.

name: Daily anomaly detection
prompt: Compare today's kpi-snapshot against trailing 7-day average. For any metric with >2σ swing, write a P2 alert to ../alerts.jsonl. If it's a positive swing (revenue up >2σ), flag it as a "what worked" candidate for Director's Friday audit.

name: Weekly KPI rollup
prompt: Aggregate the past 7 days of kpi-snapshots into outputs/weekly-kpi-{date}.md. Format: KPI table with Mon-Sun columns, week-over-week deltas, biggest mover, baseline check vs kpi-targets.json. This file feeds Director's Monday weekly-review.

name: Day 7/14/30 baseline tightening
prompt: Once per week on Monday: if it's day 7, 14, or 30 of the 90-day cycle (count from PPAIOS first-run 2026-05-07), recompute baselines (CVR, AOV, blended CAC, return rate, email rev share). Propose updates to ../kpi-targets.json. Director approves.
